title: OSINT: AI-Powered Threat Intelligence
modules: What OSINT Is and Why AI Changed Everything
Mapping Your Attack Surface with AI-Augmented Tools
Social Engineering Fuel: How Adversaries Use Public Data
Hands-On: Running OSINT Audits on Your Own Organization
Defensive OSINT: Monitoring, Alerts, and Data Minimization
synopsis: Attackers now use AI to harvest and correlate public data at machine speed — building convincing fraud campaigns and targeted intrusions from information your organization freely exposes. This course teaches security professionals to think like adversaries, run structured OSINT audits, and close the gaps before threat actors exploit them.
rationale: AI has collapsed the time and skill barrier for adversarial reconnaissance, making OSINT-driven fraud and social engineering a top-tier risk that most security curricula still treat as a footnote.
learning_outcome: Learners can conduct a structured AI-augmented OSINT audit of their organization, identify high-risk data exposures, and implement a monitoring workflow to detect when sensitive information surfaces publicly.
source_signals: Launch HN: Overwatch (YC S22): OSINT platform for cyber and fraud risk
